practice.name: Problem 6 (1985 AIME)
practice.statement: Triangle ABC is divided into six smaller triangles by lines drawn from the vertices through a common interior point. The areas of four of these triangles are as indicated. Find the area of triangle ABC.

practice.name: Problem 39 (1962 AHSME)
practice.statement: Two medians of a triangle with unequal sides are 3 inches and 4 inches. Its area is 6 square inches. Find the length of the third median in inches.

practice.name: Problem 23 (2008 AMC 8)
practice.statement: A square has a triangle inside it. Find the ratio of the area of the triangle to the area of the square.
